ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "item_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for each product */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the product belongs to */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Alcohol content of the product */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES product_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_sales_amount" REAL /* Total sales amount for the sale */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sale occurred */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_details" (
  "sale_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale detail */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale the detail belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product at the time of sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the sale detail */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the sale detail */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the sale detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_details_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the inventory is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., manager, sales, inventory) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
